description: Write tests that validate serverside rendering and client-side rendering. Need to write the tests and then run them in node. Add the tests as a script in package.json.

tasks.title: Verify serverside rendering
tasks.description: Verify that the server renders HTML strings from initial state.
acceptance_criteria: Server returns HTML string with full content rendered.
There is a test for this that runs in Node

tasks.title: Client side rendering
tasks.description: Client side re-renders the app, starting with server-provided state
acceptance_criteria: Tests that run in a browser environment
Tests check that the client does not re-render everything at the beginning
Tests check that the app is re-rendered client-side when state/signals are updated
